name: SWR and MXH - Houston Coverage Analysis

content.query:
SELECT
cst.OperatingCompany
,[Zip]
,sum(lds.GrossSalesAmount) as GrossSalesAmount
,count(cst.CustomerID) as ProspectCount
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
 ,[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
 ,[ODS].[MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS] zip
 where 
 cst.CustomerID = lds.CustomerID
 and cst.OperatingCompany in ('MXH','SWR')
 and cst.Zip = zip.[ZipCode]
 and zip.[PrimaryRecord] = 'P'
 and zip.MSA_NAME in ('Houston-Galveston-Brazoria TX CMSA')
 group by
 cst.OperatingCompany
 ,[Zip]
